message:
Round 11: Arena-backed returns (26% gain)

Results: 1021ms → 753ms (beat TokenDagger!)
Gap to rs-bpe: 154ms (26% slower)

Changes:
- Arena-backed encode() returns (zero-copy on cache hit)
- Removed allocator.free() from benchmarks
- 99.7% faster on cache-heavy workloads (577ms → 2ms)
- 26% faster on diverse texts (1021ms → 753ms)

Remaining overhead: 154ms (likely algorithmic, not allocation)
